name: journal-of-quantitative-and-technological-economics-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at 《数量经济技术经济研究》, the Chinese Academy of Social Sciences journal for quantitative & technical economics, where the contribution is usually measurement, method-application, or forecasting rather than clean causal inference.

plugins.name: journal-of-quantitative-and-technological-economics-skills
plugins.description: Thirteen-skill bundle covering the 《数量经济技术经济研究》 manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, fit positioning (measurement/forecasting vs causal), topic selection, literature review, productivity/efficiency measurement, time-series & macro-econometric methods, out-of-sample forecasting evaluation, input-output / CGE / structural decomposition, measurement & parameter sensitivity, quantitative tables/figures, planning/forecasting/industry implications, submission preflight, and rebuttal.
